overall.description: A first-person walk through a rain-slicked cyberpunk city at night, featuring neon-lit buildings, holographic billboards, and futuristic architecture. The footage appears to be from a video game (Cyberpunk 2077), with the camera moving steadily through urban streets, crossing intersections, and turning into narrower neon-lit alleys.

events.description: digital billboard content changes from All Night to Every Night advertisement

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet pavement, observing neon signs and reflections on the right

entered.detail: large horizontal digital screen displaying All Night Every Night advertisement
multi-story building with prominent cyan and pink neon lighting
tall modern glass towers with illuminated windows in the background
row of palm trees lining the street median

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wet cyberpunk city street at night, with a large digital billboard on the left and a neon-lit commercial building on the right. The camera moves forward along the reflective pavement toward distant glass skyscrapers, while the billboard cycles through advertisements.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban plaza with stairs leading to building entrance

events.description: passing from narrow street to open plaza area with stone stairs on the left

agents.ego_description: continuing forward past a plaza with wide stone stairs on the left side

entered.detail: wide stone staircase leading up to a building entrance with concrete plaza
massive vertical digital billboard displaying a woman with text

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wider plaza area featuring stone stairs on the left. A massive vertical holographic billboard becomes visible in the distance on the right as the camera advances, while the previous horizontal billboard disappears behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: major intersection with crosswalk and digital signage

events.description: approaching crosswalk with WALK signal visible on the ground
crossing the street toward the large vertical billboard

agents.ego_description: crossing the intersection while approaching a massive vertical billboard on the right

notable_agents.action: walking across the crosswalk in the opposite direction

entered.detail: small teal and orange kiosk booth on the sidewalk
zebra crossing stripes painted on the wet asphalt
tall pole with traffic lights and street signs

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches a major intersection with a crosswalk, passing a teal kiosk on the left. The massive vertical holographic billboard dominates the right side as the camera crosses the street, moving from the plaza into the crosswalk area.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit commercial street with colorful facades

events.description: turning right into narrower commercial street
passing the Fourth Wall establishment with prominent signage

agents.ego_description: turning right and proceeding down a vibrant street lined with neon-lit storefronts and palm trees

entered.detail: art deco style building with yellow and blue facade and pink neon trim
building with prominent Fourth Wall signage and blue neon lighting
palm trees illuminated by surrounding neon lights

segments.scene_description: After crossing, the camera turns right into a narrower street featuring the Fourth Wall establishment on the right and colorful art deco buildings on the left. The vertical billboard is left behind as the camera proceeds down this vibrant, neon-lit corridor.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rain-slicked cyberpunk district that transitions from a wide commercial thoroughfare into a vibrant, narrow neon corridor. It begins on a wet city street, moving past a cycling digital billboard and a neon-lit commercial building toward distant glass skyscrapers. As the camera advances, the street opens into a wider plaza with stone stairs, shifting the focus from the horizontal advertisements to a massive vertical holographic billboard looming in the distance. The scene then progresses through a major intersection, passing a teal kiosk and crossing the street under the dominance of the holographic display. Finally, the camera turns right, leaving the open plaza behind to enter a narrower street lined with colorful art deco buildings and the Fourth Wall establishment.
